title: pelargonium × broughtoniae
intro: Pelargonium × broughtoniae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, commonly used in herbal medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
